name: wave-music-visualizer
description: Floating neon wave music visualizer for macOS

extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: Wave needs audio access to visualize your music in real time.
extendInfo.NSDesktopScreenRecordingUsageDescription: Wave captures system audio to animate the neon wave to your music.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Wave can optionally visualize microphone input.
